_request_preview: [turn-1] I have $1,200 left on my Silver deductible. How much will I pay for a procedure
content: With $1,200 remaining on your deductible, you would pay that $1,200 first. After that, your Silver plan covers 80% of the remaining cost. For a $3,500 procedure, your estimated out-of-pocket cost is roughly **$1,500 to $1,700** depending on your exact deductible status and any additional cost-sharing provisions.
